description: Structured facts, evidence, or claim narrative materially conflict.
Claimed device identifier differs from the enrolled covered device.
Incident, quote, repair, or policy dates are inconsistent or require interpretation.
Claim history indicates a pattern requiring analyst assessment.
Repair/replacement value exceeds a defined operational threshold.
Goodwill, exception, or special operational handling is requested or required.
Product, geography, policy version, or incident scenario is outside the supported rule set.
A materially similar recent claim or evidence item is detected.
